creator: ade@lovett.com
text:
A couple of things wrong here:

  (1)  you're re-creating patch-aa, but pointing to a different
       file.  Don't do that :)  Use a new file, patch-ag appears
       to be free.  Make sure also that you're creating
       unified diffs in the patchfiles

  (2)  you appear to be adding things to the PLIST in an almost
       random fashion.  They're supposed to be sorted.

-aDe

-- 
Ade Lovett, Austin, TX.
